settings.heading: Got Questions? We've Got Answers!
settings.description: We know that choosing the right products and understanding how they work can sometimes be overwhelming. That's why we've put together a comprehensive FAQ section to help answer all your queries quickly and efficiently.

settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order ships, we send a tracking link to your email. If you do not receive it, contact us at billing@jk-ecomerce.com with your order number.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: You can request a return within 30 days from delivery. Items must be unused, unwashed, and returned with original tags and packaging. To start a return, email billing@jk-ecomerce.com with your order number.

settings.question: How long does it take to process a refund?
settings.answer: After your return arrives and passes inspection, refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5–10 business days. Original shipping fees are non-refundable unless the item was incorrect or defective.

settings.question: What is your shipping policy?
settings.answer: Orders are processed within 1–3 business days. Delivery times vary by destination and carrier. Shipping rates and options are shown at checkout. Once shipped, tracking details are sent by email.

settings.question: Do I need to pay customs duties or import taxes?
settings.answer: For international orders, customs duties, import taxes, and related fees (if any) are charged by your local customs authority and are the customer’s responsibility.

settings.question: How can I contact customer support?
settings.answer:
Support email: billing@jk-ecomerce.com

Business address: JK E-COMMERCE LLC, 16192 COASTAL HIGWAY, LEWES, DELAWARE 19958, United States.
